title: Brunelleschi and Ghiberti, Sacrifice of Isaac (quiz)
topic_path: Sculpture and architecture in central Italy
Brunelleschi and Ghiberti, Sacrifice of Isaac (quiz)

assessment_items.question_content: **Brunelleschi and Ghiberti's competition panels for the Florence [[☃ dropdown 1]]  doors are sometimes seen as the beginning of the Renaissance.**
hints:
**Brunelleschi and Ghiberti's competition panels for the Florence Baptistery doors are sometimes seen as the beginning of the Renaissance.**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1400-1500-renaissance-in-italy-and-the-north/florence-1/v/brunelleschi---ghiberti--sacrifice-of-isaac--competition-panels--1401-2)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Ghiberti's Isaac references Ancient Egyptian sculpture.**



![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d4ec62e319009477960d39b5b5d15c05.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**This is incorrect. Ghiberti's Isaac references Ancient Greek and Roman sculpture.**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1400-1500-renaissance-in-italy-and-the-north/florence-1/v/brunelleschi---ghiberti--sacrifice-of-isaac--competition-panels--1401-2)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Brunelleschi's panel shows a violent and dramatic moment where Abraham is in the process of killing Isaac before he is stopped by the angel.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5994e6772e43ca4f79e64c32b5d1cdeb.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**This is correct. Brunelleschi's panel shows a violent and dramatic moment where Abraham is in the process of killing Isaac before he is stopped by the angel.**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1400-1500-renaissance-in-italy-and-the-north/florence-1/v/brunelleschi---ghiberti--sacrifice-of-isaac--competition-panels--1401-2)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Compared with Brunelleschi's panel, Ghiberti's panel is more [[☃ dropdown 1]] as Abraham hesitates as looks directly into Isaac's face.**



![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/dab49253529aa21b7b67e4a3ade88531.jpg)
hints:
**Ghiberti's panel is more emotionally complex as Abraham hesitates as he looks directly into Isaac's face.**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1400-1500-renaissance-in-italy-and-the-north/florence-1/v/brunelleschi---ghiberti--sacrifice-of-isaac--competition-panels--1401-2)**
